title: More Ore xD
description: This mod adds more ore's at Minecraft.
body:
The More Ore Mod was created by Volwert123. Many new ore's have been added such as:

- Titanium

- Rhodonit

- Emerald (tools and armor)

- Redstone (tools and armor)

- Mythril

 

With these ore's you can craft many tools and armor.

 

I recommend the mod Just Enough Items to see all the recipes.

 

Supported language English, German

 More languages are coming soon.

 

Planned functions

- more languages
- more ore's
